Package recoder.service

package recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    recoder
    This package contains some basic definitions.
  • Class
    Description
    AmbiguousDeclarationException
    Exception indicating that a particular declaration is ambiguous.
    AmbiguousImportException
    Exception indicating that a particular import is ambiguous.
    AmbiguousReferenceException
    Exception indicating that a particular reference is ambiguous.
    AmbiguousStaticFieldImportException
    Exception indicating that two static imports find fields with the same name.
    AttachChange
    An attachment change of a syntax tree.
    ByteCodeInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with bytecode representations.
    ChangeHistory
    Keeps records on the syntactical changes that occured after the last validation of the model.
    ChangeHistoryEvent
    Record of the syntactical changes that occured after the last validation of the model.
    ChangeHistoryListener
    Model change listener interface.
    ConstantEvaluator
    Constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.
    ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult
    Carrier for intermediate evaluation results.
    CrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Source information service supporting cross reference information.
    CyclicInheritanceException
    Exception indicating a cyclic inheritance.
    DefaultByteCodeInfo
     
    DefaultConstantEvaluator
    Easy constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.
    DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Implements queries for cross referencing.
    DefaultErrorHandler
     
    DefaultImplicitElementInfo
    Handles requests for implicitely defined program model elements.
    DefaultNameInfo
     
    DefaultProgramModelInfo
     
    DefaultSourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
    DetachChange
    A detachment change of a syntax tree.
    ErrorHandler
    An error handler that receives exceptions from services, reports them to the user and may react upon them.
    IllegalChangeReportException
    Exception thrown by the change history in case of illegal change reports.
    IllegalModifierException
     
    ImplicitElementInfo
    Handles requests for implicitly defined program model elements.
    KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo
     
    MissingClassFileException
    Exception indicating that a vital class file is missing, usually a super type of a known class file.
    ModelUpdateListener
    Model change listener interface.
    NameInfo
    Manages the global name mapping.
    NoSuchTransformationException
    Exception indicating that a transformation is not accessible.
    ProgramModelInfo
    The program model info computes predicates for program model elements contained in recoder.abstraction.
    SourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
    TreeChange
    An atomic change of a syntax tree represented by the root of the corresponding subtree.
    TypeImportException
    Exception indicating that a certain type could not be imported.
    TypingException
    Exception indicating that a particular type rule has been violated.
    UnresolvedReferenceException
    Exception indicating that a particular reference (or reference prefix) could not be resolved.
